hero.title: Kaihou Languages
hero.subtitle: Open
hero.desc: Bridging language and technology. We support open-source projects.

about.title: About
about.text: Kaihou Languages combines technology and languages to remove barriers for open-source developers and small projects. We provide free translation, interpreting, and digital language support.

translation.title: Translation
translation.desc: Documents, READMEs, project websites, and simple content for open-source projects.

interpreting.title: Interpreting
interpreting.desc: Support for online meetings, discussions, and small team communications.

tools.title: Digital Tools
tools.desc: Chatbots, Telegram bots, and language tools to assist open-source communities.

items.question: Who is this for?
items.answer: Open-source projects, small teams, and individuals needing translation support.

items.question: Are services free?
items.answer: Completely free for open-source projects. Donations appreciated but optional. Private companies pay low-cost support if requested.
